audit_items.proof_trace: Neither nfp_tun_del_route_from_cache_v4 (L427-435) nor its delegate __nfp_tun_del_route_from_cache (L372-386) make any allocations — they are deletion functions that only call kfree() on a found list entry. The assertion forall alloc(p) has an empty domain, making the property vacuously satisfied. All entries allocated by __nfp_tun_add_route_to_cache are correctly freed either here (on route removal) or in nfp_tunnel_config_stop (L1406-1418) via list_for_each_entry_safe + kfree.
